heading: Prohibition on use of funds for attorney’s and consultant’s fees
label: 3153 Prohibition on use of funds for attorney’s and consultant’s fees
text: Assistance made available under this subchapter shall not be used directly or indirectly for an attorney’s or consultant’s fee incurred in connection with obtaining grants and contracts under this subchapter.
